title: HPOM-016: Metrics report — MAP health dashboard
description: Create scripts/map_metrics.py to report: task count by status, review queue size, conflict count, stale shared file count, change-request rate, approval-to-release lag. Output as plain text table and optionally JSON. Read-only reporting script.
acceptance_criteria: reports review queue size (SUBMITTED tasks awaiting review)
reports conflict count (tasks in CONFLICT status)
reports stale shared file count (if validate_shared_state.py exists)
